localized_texts.text: Tune Talk Traveller Sim Card (For Non-Malaysian)

A getaway calls for posting multiple IG stories and posting your holiday OOTDs while enjoying Malaysian street food.The Tune Talk Malaysia Traveller SIM is the perfect solution for non-Malaysian visitors who want to stay connected during their trip to Malaysia. This SIM card offers a hassle-free way to access high-speed internet, make local calls, and send messages, ensuring you can navigate, communicate, and enjoy your trip without any connectivity issues.
A getaway calls for posting multiple IG stories and posting your holiday OOTDs while enjoying Malaysian street food.
May choose for option of Red Pack or Black Pack to be use according to the countries you are going to.
These Packs can be purchase at the Airport Stores or can also be delivered to your doorstep or picked up at selected locations.

Quick Activation: The SIM card is pre-activated, making it easy to set up. Simply insert the SIM into your phone, and you’re ready to go.Data Packages: Choose from various data packages to suit your needs, ensuring you have enough data for your entire stay.Affordable Rates: Make local calls and send messages at affordable rates, allowing you to easily communicate with local contacts, hotels, and services.Easy Top-Up: Top up your SIM card at numerous locations, including convenience stores, Tune Talk retailers, and online platforms.Nationwide Network: Benefit from extensive network coverage across Malaysia, including major cities and tourist destinations.24/7 Support: Access 24/7 customer support for any issues or inquiries, ensuring a smooth and hassle-free experience.
Ensure your phone’s APN settings are correctly configured to access the internet. Tune Talk provides instructions for setting up APN if needed.
If you plan to travel outside Malaysia, be aware of potential roaming charges
If you encounter issues with SIM card activation, restart your phone or contact Tune Talk customer support for assistance.
What’s included: Valid for 15 days
What’s included: 40GB Full Speed Internet
What’s included: Unlimited Calls To All Networks
How to use: Show Mobile Ticket: Ticketing counter
How to use: You'll get confirmation within minutes. If you don't see any confirmation, reach out to our customer support.
How to use: Present your mobile voucher at the counter.

Terms & Conditions: The voucher is valid for 90 day(s) from the booking confirmation date. It expires at 23:59 on the last day. Any usage after the allocated quota will be utilized from basic internet quota At 90% and 100% of the Data Quota utilization, a usage notification will be sent to the subscriber and remaining available Data Quota can be checked on the Tune Talk App (http://bit.ly/app-TT) dialing *134#. Any additional top ups done by the Subscribers on this Plan will increase and extend the validity of the Plan as per the current Tune Talk airtime validity period. Authenticity of registrations will be subject to audit and checks by Tune Talk. If registration is proven to be fraudulent including but not limited due to false IDs, commercial usage, unauthorized registrations, etc. Tune Talk reserves the right to terminate the line without notice. All queries pertaining to the above Plans should be directed to Tune Talk’s Customer Care by calling 13100 or 03-2771 7000 from 8am to 10pm daily. Where the terms & conditions are translated into a language other than the English Language, in the event of any inconsistencies, conflicts or discrepancies between the terms and conditions set out in the English Language version and that of the other language(s), the English Language version shall prevail. The terms and conditions herein shall be governed and construed in the laws of Malaysia and the subscribers agree unconditionally to the non-exclusive jurisdiction of Malaysia. The subscriber’s personal information is subject to the Personal Data Protection Act, 2010 requirements as stated here at Tune Talk Privacy Policy. Kindly refer to the link for detailed information and understanding of the scope of the privacy policy therein.
Cancellation Policy: Free cancellation if cancelled 24 hours before the validity ends.
What’s included: Valid for 30 days
What’s included: 150GB Full Speed Internet
What’s included: Hotspot Shared with 150GB Base Quota
What’s included: 350GB Full Speed Internet
What’s included: Hotspot Shared with 350GB Base Quota
What’s included: International Shipping fees

Terms & Conditions: For international delivery, customer may purchase product at least 20 days before flying. For international delivery - within 10-14 working days (depending on location). The rate is included shipping fees. The voucher is valid for 90 day(s) from the booking confirmation date. It expires at 23:59 on the last day. Any usage after the allocated quota will be utilized from basic internet quota At 90% and 100% of the Data Quota utilization, a usage notification will be sent to the subscriber and remaining available Data Quota can be checked on the Tune Talk App (http://bit.ly/app-TT) dialing *134#. Any additional top ups done by the Subscribers on this Plan will increase and extend the validity of the Plan as per the current Tune Talk airtime validity period. Authenticity of registrations will be subject to audit and checks by Tune Talk. If registration is proven to be fraudulent including but not limited due to false IDs, commercial usage, unauthorized registrations, etc. Tune Talk reserves the right to terminate the line without notice. All queries pertaining to the above Plans should be directed to Tune Talk’s Customer Care by calling 13100 or 03-2771 7000 from 8am to 10pm daily.
